name: nexuspay-mcp
description: MCP server for NexusPay — give Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf native USDC payment tools

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --no-dts --clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='dist/index.js'; fs.writeFileSync(f, '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))"
